---
title: "Ranger 50%"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: html_document
---

# Ranger escenari del 50%

```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")

library(ranger)
library(caret)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)

plan(multisession, workers = 12)

# Funció per una simulació
una_iteracio_50 <- function(j, X_esc, Y_esc, num_vars, num_sig) {

  library(ranger)
  library(caret)

  X_df <- as.data.frame(X_esc[[j]])
  colnames(X_df) <- paste0("V", seq_len(ncol(X_df)))

  y_fac <- as.factor(Y_esc[[j]])

  tryCatch({

    dades_rf <- cbind(X_df, y = y_fac)

    model_rf <- ranger(
      y ~ .,
      data = dades_rf,
      num.trees = 500,
      mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_df))),
      importance = "permutation",
      num.threads = 1,
      seed = 123
    )

    imp <- importance(model_rf)

    # llindar de selecció en 0,001
    sel_noms <- names(imp[imp > 0.001])

    if(length(sel_noms) == 0) {

      vars_sel <- integer(0)

    } else {

      vars_sel <- as.integer(
        sub("V", "", sel_noms)
      )

    }

    metriques(
      vars_seleccionades = vars_sel,
      p = 0.5,
      nv = num_vars
    )

  }, error = function(e) {

    cat(sprintf(
      "  [WARN ranger] sim %d: %s\n",
      j,
      conditionMessage(e)
    ))

    c(
      sensibilitat = NA,
      especificitat = NA,
      VPP = NA,
      VPN = NA,
      accuracy = NA,
      net_benefit = NA
    )
  })
}

# Resultats
resultats_ranger_50 <- data.frame(
  N             = integer(),
  pi            = numeric(),
  correlation   = character(),
  sensibilitat  = numeric(),
  especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP           = numeric(),
  VPN           = numeric(),
  accuracy      = numeric(),
  net_benefit   = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

temps_total <- system.time({

  resultats_llista <- vector("list", nrow(comb))

  for(i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    cat("\n====================================\n")
    cat(sprintf(
      "Escenari %d/%d (N=%s, pi=%s, cor=%s)\n",
      i, nrow(comb), N, pi, correlation
    ))
    cat("====================================\n")

    temps_esc <- system.time({

      metr_iter <- lapply(
        1:iters,
        una_iteracio_50,
        X_esc = X[[i]],
        Y_esc = Y[[i]],
        num_vars = num_vars,
        num_sig = num_sig
      ) |>
        progressify() |>
        futurize(seed = 123)

    })

    metr_mat <- do.call(rbind, metr_iter)

    metr_mat <- as.data.frame(metr_mat)

    resultats_llista[[i]] <- data.frame(
      N             = N,
      pi            = pi,
      correlation   = correlation,
      sensibilitat  = mean(metr_mat$sensibilitat,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      especificitat = mean(metr_mat$especificitat,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      VPP           = mean(metr_mat$VPP,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      VPN           = mean(metr_mat$VPN,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      accuracy      = mean(metr_mat$accuracy,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      net_benefit   = mean(metr_mat$net_benefit,
                            na.rm = TRUE),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    cat(sprintf(
      "Escenari %d completat en %.2f segons\n",
      i,
      temps_esc["elapsed"]
    ))

    cat(sprintf(
      "Sens=%.3f | Espec=%.3f | VPP=%.3f | VPN=%.3f | Acc=%.3f | NB=%.3f\n",
      resultats_llista[[i]]$sensibilitat,
      resultats_llista[[i]]$especificitat,
      resultats_llista[[i]]$VPP,
      resultats_llista[[i]]$VPN,
      resultats_llista[[i]]$accuracy,
      resultats_llista[[i]]$net_benefit
    ))
  }

  resultats_ranger_50 <- do.call(
    rbind,
    resultats_llista
  )
})

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat(sprintf(
  "Temps total: %.2f minuts\n",
  temps_total["elapsed"]/60
))
cat("====================================\n\n")

print(resultats_ranger_50)

save(
  resultats_ranger_50,
  file = "resultats_ranger_50.RData"
)
```
